data.name: Room Prison
data.detailed_description:
Player play a girl and wake up to find yourself trapped in a room. The door is locked, and it looks like you need to collect some items, make some tools out of them, and crack some secrets to get out of the room.
· An escape room game.
· Search for items.
· Several items can be made into new items.
· Solve puzzles and get clues.
· Think of strategies to eventually get out of the room.
data.about_the_game:
Player play a girl and wake up to find yourself trapped in a room. The door is locked, and it looks like you need to collect some items, make some tools out of them, and crack some secrets to get out of the room.
· An escape room game.
· Search for items.
· Several items can be made into new items.
· Solve puzzles and get clues.
· Think of strategies to eventually get out of the room.
data.short_description: Player play a girl and wake up to find yourself trapped in a room. The door is locked, and it looks like you need to collect some items, make some tools out of them, and crack some secrets to get out of the room.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: win7/8/10
  • 處理器: i5
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: i5 Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: win7/8/10
  • 處理器: i7
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: i7 Graphics
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
